title: Thinking differently about mental illness | Moffitt & Caspi: Genes, Environment, Health, Behavior
excerpts:
Section Title: Thinking differently about mental illness
Content:
Thinking differently about mental illness
This episode of Top of Mind with Julie Rose tackles new ideas about mental illness. It discusses the use of psychedelics, indigenous practices, and also our team’s research findings, in an interview with Terrie Moffitt, among several other guests. Listen [here.](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/s2-e12-thinking-differently-about-mental-illness/id1031705346?i=1000559298876)
